citations.description: Ticket field deps: [] — no child story IDs listed; comments: [] — no Gerrit vote attestations recorded
Phase 2 code is present, consistent with child stories completed, but does not constitute Gerrit vote evidence

findings.criterion: Every child story landed on main via Gerrit (LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1)
findings.detail: This criterion is untagged (codebase-verifiable by default) and requires evidence of Gerrit vote records (LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1 on each of the 13 child stories — 12 Phase 1 splits + 1 Phase 2 story). The ticket lists no child dependencies (`deps: []`), has no comments, and Gerrit vote records are not accessible from the repository. The codebase confirms the Phase 2 outcomes are present (allowlist removed, absolute gate in place, limit locked, docs updated), which is consistent with child stories having landed, but the specific Gerrit vote evidence required by the criterion cannot be verified from the codebase. No `[operator-attested]` tag was applied, so the codebase bar applies and cannot be met by codebase inspection alone.
findings.remediation: Tag this criterion `[operator-attested]` and record a ticket comment for each child story naming its Gerrit change number/URL, the LLM-Review +1 voter, and the Verified +1 timestamp. Alternatively, list child story ticket IDs as deps so they can be individually verified.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
